title: Armor Warn
description: Alarms you by triggering a two-stage alarm: the first at 25% total armor, and the second at 10%
body:
## **🛡️ ArmorWarn**
*Don't let your armor catch you off guard.*

---

**🔧 What does it do?**
Tired of your armor breaking mid-fight without any warning? ArmorWarn watches your armor durability in real time and alerts you before it's too late.

---

**🎲 How does it work?**
ArmorWarn automatically runs in the background — no setup, no keybinds. It calculates the average durability of all your equipped armor pieces and fires a warning when things get dangerous.

---

**✅ Features**
- 🟡 Yellow title warning at **25%** average durability
- 🔴 Red title warning at **10%** average durability
- 🔔 Sound alert on every warning
- ⚡ Lightweight — zero performance impact
- 🎮 Client-side only — works on any server
- 🔁 Automatic — no keybinds, just works

---

**📦 Requirements for NT1**
- Minecraft 1.21+
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---
